_comment: dialogue_vaelwyn.json: This table is used for the npc chat in Vaelwyn.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome to Vaelwyn, sanctuary of the ancient woods.
dialogue.help: The forest spirits whisper of imbalance. Aid us, if you can.
dialogue.lore: Vaelwyn was grown, not built, from the roots of the Worldtree's kin.
dialogue.farewell: May the leaves shelter your journey.

dialogue.greeting: Nature speaks to those who listen. Do you hear it?
dialogue.help: The Verdant Maw corrupts the glades. We must act swiftly.
dialogue.lore: The Circle of Thorns was born from the Second Bloom, when wild magic surged.

dialogue.greeting: Knowledge is the root of all power. What do you seek?
dialogue.help: The ley lines near Vaelwyn are unstable. We need arcane assistance.
dialogue.lore: The Arcane Synod studies the flow of magic through the forest’s heart.
dialogue.farewell: May your mind remain sharp and your spells true.
